messages.content: Robust training plan was created for shashank since he was the recent one to join in company. rephrase this
A comprehensive training plan was devised for Shashank, as he was the most recent addition to the company.
Worked on two Projects like SPTO and ELX Project where I used my Project management skills to plan and deliver the high quality project in time. rephrase this

I successfully completed two projects, namely the SPTO and ELX projects, employing my exceptional project management skills to meticulously plan and execute them within the designated timeframe, ensuring a top-notch and timely deliverance.
whenever required SOP's, Power flow document, Database etc. is updated. rephrase this
Whenever necessary, updates are made to Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), Power Flow documents, and the Database.

Maintained 5-day SLA sustainable throughout the year by creating awareness and helping the Team to plan and priorities the jobs. As per revised request from Justin, helped and guided to Team to send the custom jobs before 5th day from September 2023. rephrase this

I ensured the sustainability of a 5-day Service Level Agreement (SLA) throughout the entire year by raising awareness among the team and assisting them in effectively planning and prioritizing their tasks. In response to a revised request from Justin, I provided guidance and support to the team in order to ensure that custom jobs were submitted by the 5th day starting from September 2023.

1. Worked thoroughly with team to maintain the sustainability of process like maintaining the TAT/SLA/Internal accuracy throughout the year.
2. From Sep as per request from counterpart worked with team to submit the custom jobs before 5 days and standard Large and Major jobs before 3 days.
3. Also worked with Team to keep all the documents, SOP's Database etc. updated. rephrase this

1. Collaborated extensively with the team to uphold the sustainability of our processes, including consistently meeting targets for Turnaround Time (TAT), Service Level Agreement (SLA), and Internal Accuracy throughout the entire year.
2. In response to a request from our counterpart, beginning in September, worked closely with the team to ensure that custom jobs were submitted no later than 5 days prior to the deadline, and standard Large and Major jobs were submitted no later than 3 days prior.
3. Actively participated in updating and maintaining all essential documents, including Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs), databases, and other relevant materials, in close coordination with the team.
Also driven the Digitalization activity within the team and with help of team completed almost 20+ video's. rephrase this
Furthermore, I spearheaded the digitalization initiative within our team and, with the assistance of my colleagues, successfully produced over 20 videos as part of this effort.

1. Part of RCA Team. Meeting with team members to understand the pain areas also guided and supported team to work on Errors.
2. Co-Lead HPP with Sagar to work on improving internal Error accuracy. rephrase this

1. As a member of the RCA Team, I actively participated in meetings with team members to identify pain points and provided guidance and support to address and rectify errors.
2. I collaborated with Sagar as a co-lead for the High Priority Projects (HPP), working together to enhance internal error accuracy.
1. Found an opportunity with earlier SAM Team discussed with manager the same, also provided support wherever required. rephrase this
I identified an opportunity while working with the previous SAM Team, and proceeded to discuss this with my manager. I also extended my support whenever needed.
worked closely with various teams across Industrial CSTS to enrich the videos this year as a result of this we were able to accommodate 50+ videos in our database. rephrase this

In collaboration with multiple teams across Industrial CSTS, I closely collaborated to enhance the quality of videos throughout the year. As a result of these efforts, we successfully incorporated more than 50 videos into our database.
1. Worked on Two projects this year mainly on SPTO and ELX Documentation resulting into additional two process knowledge. rephrase this
This year, I actively contributed to two projects, primarily focusing on SPTO and ELX documentation. As a result, I gained valuable knowledge in two additional processes.

Process Digitalization-This year I was accountable to enrich the Video Database and with support of my team we were able to add on 50+ Videos overall CSTS and will be adding more till End of the year. I was accountable to lead this project throughout CSTS Team and have passionately delivered my planned goals accordingly. rephrase this

As the focal point for process digitalization, my responsibility was to enhance the Video Database this year. With the dedicated support of my team, we successfully added over 50 videos across CSTS. Furthermore, we continue to work towards adding more videos until the end of the year. Taking the lead in this project for the entire CSTS team, I have passionately worked towards achieving the predetermined objectives.
Mentored Deepak and Shashank in this activity I got the opportunity to showcase my Learner competency. rephrase this
I had the privilege of mentoring Deepak and Shashank in this undertaking, which allowed me to demonstrate my proficiency as a learner.
